title: AlarcticJourneys
description: Aesthetic Survival with Adventure Mods! A list of familiar mods into one pack!
body:
# AlarcticJourneys

A Modpack that is solely for Aesethetic Adventures with a lot of mods. I have my own version I play with, so I thought I'd share this as a public modpack for those who are interested!

The main aesthetic mods used in this pack are:

[Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)

[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)

[Adventure Redefined](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventure-redefined)

[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)

[Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)

[Caves & Canyons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/caves__canyons)

[Beautify: Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated)

[Time Control]([https://github.com/CmdrJane/time-and-wind/wiki/Setting-Up](https://modrinth.com/mod/time-control))


### Recommended Video Settings:
1. FOV: 90
2. Render Distance: 65 or max
3. Chunk Simulation: 15


TimeControl Config Settings (Recommended Option):

```
Config Files or do /timecontrolclient [tab] 
"dayDuration": 72000, "nightDuration": 6000
```

I also have created my own mod simply for my own enjoyment. It's called [Blockified](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockified!).

You can use your own shaders if you like :3


If you see a mod not in the list, feel free to join my small FAQ server I made solely for this! You can request some mods if you want! 

NOTE: I will not add distant horizons! Maybe in the future!
(I'm more of the person to use the finalized ver rather than its beta/alpha stages)
